calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RODD WALTON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- O F F C A L E N D A R --
first amended complaint filed on 1/9/2003. (DAG/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. Arnole W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, City Housing, Inc. and Defendant, Rodd Walton appeared in pro per. Also present, Ruth Clarks, General Manager of premises and employee of City Housing, Inc. The case settled per oral stipulation of the parties which is read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
